sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45509" key="eu)xrhmone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐχρημονέω</orth>, <sense id="n45509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐχρηματέω</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.196</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
